summary: The choice text appears to splice in an unrelated lyrical fragment, reducing player-facing choice clarity.
The next turn repeats a substantial chunk of already-shown scene text instead of cleanly advancing from the previous state.
The same previously female-coded vendor is suddenly recast as an old man without any visible explanation.
该句在关键情报分析对白中出现明显错拼式隐喻，短暂破坏正文可读性和语义稳定性。
